metadata.description: Multi-agent idea refinement tool. Convene a panel of expert AI personas to debate, hone, or brainstorm any question. Finance, product, and engineering domain presets. Works in Claude Code, Kiro, and any AI IDE.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Multi-persona Claude debate skill with three modes: debate, hone, brainstorm. Domain presets for finance, product, and engineering.
